title: iresine calea
intro: Iresine calea, also known as the Mexican mint or Resin flower, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, colds, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Iresine calea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
